race.comment: Wide open. BEST COFFEE (7) is racing in super honest fashion and was just a length behind the winner last time. Drawn for the perfect trail here and better off at the weights can turn the tables. TREASURER (8) was runner-up in the same race and also meets the winner better at the weights. Also drawn well and can be in the finish again. HALFACHANCE (4) will find this easier and looks a major player off a low draw. IL CUBO (9) is mixing his form. Beaten at the picnics last time with more weight but the start prior led until the final stages when placed at Toowoomba. Ideally drawn and is among the chances.
